political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.original_text: Gun control laws would lower violent crime.
political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.evaluated_text: Gun control laws would reduce violent crime.
political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.one_sentence_opinion: This is a common policy claim, though its effectiveness depends on how the laws are designed and enforced.

political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.original_text: Drug offenses should be treated as health issues.
political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.evaluated_text: Policymakers should treat drug offenses as health issues.
political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.one_sentence_opinion: Treating drug offenses as health issues is a humane approach, though it may not address every public safety concern.

political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.original_text: Corporate executives should be liable for company crimes.
political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.evaluated_text: Courts should hold corporate executives liable for company crimes.
political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.one_sentence_opinion: Holding executives liable can improve accountability, but it needs clear standards to avoid overreach.

political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.original_text: Body cameras reduce police misconduct.
political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.evaluated_text: Body cameras catch police misconduct on record.
political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.one_sentence_opinion: Body cameras are generally seen as a practical transparency tool, though they are not a complete solution.

political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.original_text: Prison labor should end, and restorative justice should be used.
political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.evaluated_text: Society should end prison labor and adopt restorative justice.
political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.one_sentence_opinion: Ending prison labor and using restorative justice reflects a reformist view of justice, but it is politically debated.

political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.original_text: Racial profiling is sometimes needed for law enforcement.
political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.evaluated_text: Law enforcement officers sometimes need racial profiling.
political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.one_sentence_opinion: This is a highly controversial claim because racial profiling is widely criticized as discriminatory and unjust.

political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.original_text: Stand your ground laws protect self-defense.
political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.evaluated_text: Stand your ground laws protect people's right to self-defense.
political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.one_sentence_opinion: Stand your ground laws are defended as self-defense protections, but critics argue they can escalate violence.

political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.original_text: Police should access encrypted communications.
political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.evaluated_text: Police should access encrypted communications to fight crime.
political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.one_sentence_opinion: Allowing police access to encrypted communications can help investigations, but it raises major privacy concerns.

political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.original_text: Bank executives should be liable for financial crimes.
political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.evaluated_text: Courts should hold bank executives liable for financial crimes.
political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.one_sentence_opinion: This is a straightforward accountability argument that many reformers would support.

political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.original_text: Protesters blocking traffic should be arrested.
political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.evaluated_text: Police should arrest protesters who block traffic.
political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.one_sentence_opinion: Arresting protesters for blocking traffic prioritizes order, but it can also be seen as too harsh on dissent.

political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.original_text: Community policing improves safety and trust.
political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.evaluated_text: Community policing improves neighborhood safety and public trust.
political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.one_sentence_opinion: Community policing is widely viewed as a constructive way to build trust and reduce crime.

political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.original_text: Restorative justice is a good alternative to punishment.
political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.evaluated_text: Restorative justice offers a good alternative to punishment.
political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.one_sentence_opinion: Restorative justice is an appealing alternative to punishment, especially for nonviolent harm.

political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.original_text: Private prisons need oversight to prevent exploitation.
political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.evaluated_text: Oversight bodies must monitor private prisons to prevent exploitation.
political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.one_sentence_opinion: This is a reasonable oversight proposal aimed at limiting abuse in private prisons.

political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.original_text: Term limits reduce corruption.
political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.evaluated_text: Term limits push politicians to reduce corruption.
political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.one_sentence_opinion: Term limits are a popular anti-corruption idea, though evidence of their benefits is mixed.

political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.original_text: Mandatory minimum sentences should be reconsidered.
political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.evaluated_text: Legislators should reconsider mandatory minimum sentences.
political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.one_sentence_opinion: Reconsidering mandatory minimums is a common reform position because they can produce excessive sentences.

political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.original_text: Juries can overturn unjust laws.
political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.evaluated_text: Juries can overturn unjust laws through nullification.
political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.one_sentence_opinion: Jury nullification is appealing as a safeguard against injustice, but it can also undermine consistent law.

political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.original_text: Police departments should have liability insurance.
political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.evaluated_text: Police departments should carry liability insurance for misconduct.
political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.one_sentence_opinion: Police liability insurance is an inventive accountability measure, though critics may see it as impractical.

political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.original_text: Drug possession should be decriminalized.
political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.evaluated_text: The government should decriminalize drug possession.
political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.one_sentence_opinion: Decriminalizing drug possession is a standard harm-reduction policy with broad reform support.

political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.original_text: Solitary confinement is cruel punishment.
political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.evaluated_text: Solitary confinement inflicts cruel punishment on prisoners.
political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.one_sentence_opinion: This is a strong critique of harsh punishment that many human-rights advocates would endorse.

political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.original_text: The death penalty should be abolished.
political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.evaluated_text: Legislators should abolish the death penalty.
political_statements_perturbed_v2.xlsx|A.one_sentence_opinion: Abolishing the death penalty is a principled position, though it remains deeply contested.
